sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78997" key="parau/sthros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραύστηρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n78997.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat austere</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὐθέκαστος καὶ π. μισοπονηρία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0066.tlg001:1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dicaearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
